body.docCntHtml:
接口调用地址

生产环境地址：https://api.cmbchina.com/itrip/xft-api/v1/project/batchUpdate

测试环境地址：https://api.cmburl.cn:8065/itrip/xft-api/uat/v1/project/batchUpdate

接口描述

批量修改项目信息，一个批次最大支持修改50条项目信息，支持更新项目id、名称、所属上级、项目类型、项目所在地、项目开始时间、项目结束时间、项目所属行业、项目角色、项目可见用户组（目前仅支持用户）、项目状态、项目是否免税。

调用方式

METHOD: POST

CONTENT-TYPE: APPLICATION/JSON

接口输入参数

{"requestHeader":[{"elementData":{"name":"header","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E5%A4%B4%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"}}],"requestBody":[{"elementData":{"name":"body","type":"ARRAY","desc":"%20%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"%E8%AF%B7%E6%B1%82%E4%BD%93%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"projectSeqId","required":true,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%87%AA%E5%A2%9Eid","exampleValue":"1","desc":"","maxLength":"20"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"newId","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectName","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"newName","desc":"","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectParentId","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"PRJ20220913195101","desc":"","maxLength":"120"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectParentName","required":false,"label":"%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E4%B8%8A%E7%BA%A7%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE","desc":"","maxLength":"100"}},{"elementData":{"type":"BOOLEAN","name":"projectStatus","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"true","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"projectType","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"prjTypeId","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"PRJTYPE20230602113257","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}}]},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"projectRoles","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2","exampleValu 8%A7%81%EF%BC%89","exampleValue":"false","desc":"","maxLength":"1"}},{"elementData":{"type":"ARRAY","name":"userGroup","required":false,"label":"%E5%8F%AF%E8%A7%81%E7%94%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%84","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"type","required":false,"label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"EMPLOYEE","desc":"%20%E7%9B%AE%E5%89%8D%E4%BB%85%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99EMPLOYEE","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"staff","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E4%BF%A1%E6%81%AF","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empId","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5id","exampleValue":"U0000","desc":"%20%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5id%E3%80%81%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81%E3%80%81%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0%E3%80%81%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E6%89%8B%E6%9C%BA%E5%8F%B7%EF%BC%8C%E5%9B%9B%E9%80%89%E4%B8%80%E5%A1%AB%E5%86%99%E5%8D%B3%E5%8F%AF","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNumber","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E8%8A%B1%E5%90%8D%E5%86%8C%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"A0001","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"empNam","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%90%8D%E7%A7%B0","exampleValue":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%90%8D","desc":"","maxLength":"150"}},{"elementData":{"type":"LONG","name":"phoneNbr","required":false,"label":"%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E6%89%8B%E6%9C%BA%E5%8F%B7","exampleValue":"11111111111","desc":"","maxLength":"12"}}]}]},{"elementData":{"type":"OBJECT","name":"projectStageDto","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81","exampleValue":"","desc":""},"children":[{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectStageCode","required":false,"label":"%E9%A1%B9%E7%9B%AE%E7%8A%B6%E6%80%81%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"code","desc":"","maxLength":"50"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"projectStageName","requi 83%E5%9B%B4%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B","exampleValue":"EMPLOYEE","desc":"%20%E6%94%AF%E6%8C%81%20%E5%A6%82%E4%B8%8B%E9%80%82%E7%94%A8%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%9A%84%E9%85%8D%E7%BD%AE%EF%BC%9A%0A*%20%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%EF%BC%9AEMPLOYEE%0A*%20%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%EF%BC%9ADEPARTMENT%0A*%20%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%EF%BC%9AROLE%0A*%20%E8%81%8C%E7%BA%A7%EF%BC%9ARANK%0A*%20%E5%B2%97%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%9APOST%0A*%20%E8%81%8C%E4%BD%8D%EF%BC%9AJOB"}},{"elementData":{"type":"STRING","name":"typeCode","label":"%E7%B1%BB%E5%9E%8B%E7%BC%96%E7%A0%81","exampleValue":"80000000","desc":"%20*%20%E5%BD%93authType%E4%B8%BAEMPLOYEE%20%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BC%A0%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E7%9A%84%E5%91%98%E5%B7%A5%E5%8F%B7%EF%BC%88%E9%97%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%B4%E6%8A%A4%EF%BC%89%0A*%20%E5%BD%93authType%E4%B8%BADEPARTMENT%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BC%A0%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E7%9A%84%E9%83%A8%E9%97%A8%E5%8F%B7%EF%BC%88%E9%97%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%B4%E6%8A%A4%EF%BC%89%0A*%20%E5%BD%93authType%E4%B8%BAROLE%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BC%A0%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E7%9A%84%E8%A7%92%E8%89%B2%E5%8F%B7%EF%BC%88%E9%97%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%B4%E6%8A%A4%EF%BC%89%0A*%20%E5%BD%93authType%E4%B8%BARANK%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BC%A0%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E7%9A%84%E8%81%8C%E7%BA%A7%E5%8F%B7%EF%BC%88%E9%97%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%B4%E6%8A%A4%EF%BC%89%0A*%20%E5%BD%93authType%E4%B8%BAPOST%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BC%A0%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E7%9A%84%E5%B2%97%E4%BD%8D%E5%8F%B7%EF%BC%88%E9%97%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%B4%E6%8A%A4%EF%BC%89%0A*%20%E5%BD%93authType%E4%B8%BAJOB%E5%BD%93%E5%89%8D%E5%AD%97%E6%AE%B5%E4%BC%A0%E4%BC%81%E4%B8%9A%E8%87%AA%E5%B7%B1%E7%9A%84%E8%81%8C%E4%BD%8D%E5%8F%B7%EF%BC%88%E9%97%A8%E6%88%B7%E7%BB%B4%E6%8A%A4%EF%BC%89"}}]}]}]}],"requestQuery":[{"elementData":{"name":"query","type":"OBJECT","desc":"%20query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9","label":"query%E6%A0%B9%E8%8A%82%E7%82%B9"},"children":[]}]}

接口输出参数
